[スキーマ]

番号差分種別名前識別子 / 変更前の値 -> 変更後の値
変更スキーマentryPoint_jpcrp020000-srs_2025-11-01.xsd
変更   名前空間宣言   xmlns:entryPoint_jpcrp020000-srs_2025-11-01="http://disclosure.edinet-fsa.go.jp/samples/jpcrp020000-srs_2025-11-01"

変更スキーマjpcrp_cor_2025-11-01.xsd
00002追加   要素宣言   将来予定株式数 (jpcrp_cor:NumberOfSharesScheduledToBeHeldInformationAboutDirectorsAndCorporateAuditors)
00003追加   要素宣言   将来予定株式数 (jpcrp_cor:NumberOfSharesScheduledToBeHeldInformationAboutExecutiveDirectors)

00006追加   要素宣言   変更した事業年度 (jpcrp_cor:FiscalYearOfChangeInPurposeOfShareholdingInvestmentSharesReclassifiedFromHeldForPurposesOtherThanPureInvestmentToHeldForPureInvestmentReportingCompany)
00007追加   要素宣言   変更の理由及び変更後の保有又は売却に関する方針 (jpcrp_cor:ReasonForChangeInPurposeOfShareholdingAndPolicyOnHoldingOrSaleOfSharesAfterChangeInvestmentSharesReclassifiedFromHeldForPurposesOtherThanPureInvestmentToHeldForPureInvestmentReportingCompany)
00008追加   要素宣言   変更した事業年度 (jpcrp_cor:FiscalYearOfChangeInPurposeOfShareholdingInvestmentSharesReclassifiedFromHeldForPurposesOtherThanPureInvestmentToHeldForPureInvestmentLargestHoldingCompany)
00009追加   要素宣言   変更の理由及び変更後の保有又は売却に関する方針 (jpcrp_cor:ReasonForChangeInPurposeOfShareholdingAndPolicyOnHoldingOrSaleOfSharesAfterChangeInvestmentSharesReclassifiedFromHeldForPurposesOtherThanPureInvestmentToHeldForPureInvestmentLargestHoldingCompany)
00010追加   要素宣言   変更した事業年度 (jpcrp_cor:FiscalYearOfChangeInPurposeOfShareholdingInvestmentSharesReclassifiedFromHeldForPurposesOtherThanPureInvestmentToHeldForPureInvestmentSecondLargestHoldingCompany)
00011追加   要素宣言   変更の理由及び変更後の保有又は売却に関する方針 (jpcrp_cor:ReasonForChangeInPurposeOfShareholdingAndPolicyOnHoldingOrSaleOfSharesAfterChangeInvestmentSharesReclassifiedFromHeldForPurposesOtherThanPureInvestmentToHeldForPureInvestmentSecondLargestHoldingCompany)
00012追加   要素宣言   財務制限条項に関する注記 (jpcrp_cor:NotesRegardingFinancialCovenantTextBlock)
00013追加   要素宣言   国際最低課税額に対する法人税等の注記 (jpcrp_cor:NotesRegardingIncomeTaxesForGlobalMinimumTaxTextBlock)
00014追加   要素宣言   関係会社株式評価損の注記 (jpcrp_cor:NotesRegardingLossOnValuationOfSharesOfSubsidiariesAndAssociatesTextBlock)
